# 

> {{DESCRIPTION}}

## Overview
 is a free web application built with Next.js, hosted at https://.ezoai.jp

## Features
- {{FEATURES}}

## Technical Stack
- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- Hosting: Vercel
- AI: Anthropic Claude API

## API
- POST /api/{{MAIN_ENDPOINT}} - Main functionality endpoint
